Name: Rampart Annihilation
VFX_Description: Full-body charge that detonates masonry-like fragments off the target.

Name: Skullplate Onslaught
VFX_Description: Bony snout plate glows dull orange on impact; a shockwave ring of dust.

Name: Thornstorm Volley
VFX_Description: A fan of thrown quills that thunk in with visible shafts left standing.

Name: Ironquill Bulwark
VFX_Description: Dorsal quills snap erect, glinting like iron nails.

Name: Choking Pall
VFX_Description: The whole field browns out; the hound's eyes are the last thing visible.

Name: Run-Down
VFX_Description: A circling sprint that ends in a shoulder-check through the dust cloud.

Name: Snap
VFX_Description: A blurred lunge, jaws clicking shut with a dry crack.

Name: Dust Kick
VFX_Description: Hind legs rake the ground, throwing a curtain of ochre grit.

Name: Collapse Barrow
VFX_Description: A whole burial mound heaves up and slumps over the target.

Name: Undermine
VFX_Description: The ground under the target sags into a funnel of collapsing earth.

Name: Spade Claw
VFX_Description: One oversized digging claw swats in a low arc, soil trailing.

Name: Entrench
VFX_Description: The mole sinks to its shoulders in an instant self-dug pit.

Name: Bloomburst
VFX_Description: The antler-vines flower all at once in a concussive pollen flash.

Name: Thorn Flick
VFX_Description: A casual toss of the head; a single vine-thorn whips across.

Name: Verdant Ward
VFX_Description: Soft green light blooms from the antlers; petals settle on allies.

Name: Tangle Snare
VFX_Description: Thorned vines erupt beneath the target and lace over its legs.

Name: Reap the Fleeing
VFX_Description: The nightmare rears; a scythe of black mist follows the swing of its head.

Name: Terror Gallop
VFX_Description: Hoofbeats echo from every direction before the hit lands.

Name: Soul Chase
VFX_Description: The horse phases through the target, trailing torn wisps of spirit.

Name: Night Veil
VFX_Description: Darkness pools off the mane like ink dropped in water.

Name: Avalanche Blow
VFX_Description: A two-limbed overhead smash that buries the target in rubble.

Name: Seismic Stomp
VFX_Description: One stamp; the arena jumps, dust leaping off every surface.

Name: Stone Fist
VFX_Description: A forelimb like a quarry block hammers straight down.

Name: Calcify
VFX_Description: Skin audibly hardens, seams of grey stone spreading like frost.

Name: Strangleroots
VFX_Description: The entire root system surfaces and constricts in a woody spiral.

Name: Root Lash
VFX_Description: A root snaps out of the soil like a bullwhip.

Name: Sap Drink
VFX_Description: Pale rootlets pierce the target; amber sap flows back along them.

Name: Barkskin
VFX_Description: Bark plates grind closed over every gap in the stump's body.

Name: Last Knot
VFX_Description: Every cord on its body strikes at once, weaving a strangling web.

Name: Gallows Drop
VFX_Description: The revenant hoists the target a metre and lets it fall short.

Name: Cinch
VFX_Description: A loop of knotted binding tightens around the throat and drags.

Name: Wire Whip
VFX_Description: A sinew-cord cracks across the target faster than sight.

Name: Funeral Wind
VFX_Description: A downdraft of grave-cold air flattens the grass around the target.

Name: Peck of Omens
VFX_Description: A precise strike; a single black feather drifts down after.

Name: Death Knell
VFX_Description: The exposed ribcage rings like a struck bell; the tone lingers.

Name: Carrion Call
VFX_Description: A rattling caw; shadows of circling birds cross the ground.

Name: Horned Judgment
VFX_Description: Antlers blaze white-green as the stag charges through the target.

Name: Antler Jab
VFX_Description: A short, contemptuous toss of the crowned head.

Name: Sovereign's Bloom
VFX_Description: Flowers along the antlers open; drifting petals knit wounds shut.

Name: Wild Command
VFX_Description: The stag-lord's eyes flare green; the ally's hackles rise in answer.

Name: Barnacle Grind
VFX_Description: The crusted shell rasps across the target, shaving off sparks and scale.

Name: Scuttle Strike
VFX_Description: A blinding sideways skitter ending in a claw-hook.

Name: Pincer Snip
VFX_Description: One claw scissors shut with a wet clack.

Name: Shell Up
VFX_Description: The crab folds flat; barnacled plate faces the world.

Name: Jawlock
VFX_Description: The jaws seize and simply do not let go; the body whips behind them.

Name: Salt Wound
VFX_Description: Brine gushes from the gills directly into the target's open cuts.

Name: Bite
VFX_Description: The whole fish is briefly just an open mouth.

Name: Thrash
VFX_Description: Violent side-to-side shaking; water and red spray.

Name: Deluge Croak
VFX_Description: A croak so deep it arrives as a wall of displaced water.

Name: Brine Spit
VFX_Description: A pressurised jet of cloudy saltwater to the eyes.

Name: Weeping Mist
VFX_Description: The frog's whole skin weeps; a stinging fog rolls off it.

Name: Puff Up
VFX_Description: The toad inflates to twice its size with a rubbery creak.

Name: Thermal Lance Punch
VFX_Description: One punch rides a spear of superheated water that flashes to steam.

Name: Cavitation Snap
VFX_Description: The claw snaps; a collapsing bubble flashes white where it points.

Name: Jab Volley
VFX_Description: A drumroll of punches too fast to count.

Name: Boiling Point
VFX_Description: The crest glows through orange to white; water steams off it.

Name: Grief Surge
VFX_Description: The nymph's form collapses into a breaking wave of drowned faces.

Name: Undertow Touch
VFX_Description: A pale hand of moving water brushes past; the pull follows.

Name: Drowning Lure
VFX_Description: A soft song; the water around the target thickens visibly.

Name: Mendtide
VFX_Description: A wave washes over the ally and recedes, taking the wounds with it.

Name: Fortress Slam
VFX_Description: The whole spiral tower of shell pivots and falls like a drawbridge.

Name: Shell Bash
VFX_Description: The fortress-shell tilts and slams down edge-first.

Name: Withdraw
VFX_Description: The snail vanishes inside; the shell seals with a stone-on-stone boom.

Name: Rampart Slime
VFX_Description: A glistening moat of slime spreads out around the target's feet.

Name: Void Lash
VFX_Description: The tail sweeps through a smear of pure black that bends the light.

Name: Static Discharge
VFX_Description: Blue-white arcs crawl along the target's limbs and lock them.

Name: Phase Bite
VFX_Description: The eel's head flickers out of existence and reappears mid-bite.

Name: Unreal Slip
VFX_Description: Half the eel's body desaturates, like film losing a frame.

Name: Ninefold Fury
VFX_Description: Every head strikes at once; the water itself seems to bite.

Name: Triple Maul
VFX_Description: Three heads strike in overlapping arcs from different angles.

Name: Coral Rake
VFX_Description: Razor coral crusts drag across the target, leaving chalky gouges.

Name: Regrow Head
VFX_Description: A severed stump boils and blossoms into a new snarling head.

Name: The Sea Remembers
VFX_Description: The water darkens with every wrong ever drowned in it, then falls.

Name: Tide of Ruin
VFX_Description: A green-black wave crests over the target and hangs, refusing to break.

Name: Abyssal Crush
VFX_Description: A barnacled fist falls with the weight of a sinking ship.

Name: Drowned Court
VFX_Description: Kelp-wrapped shades of drowned sailors rise and bow to the allies.

Name: Event Horizon
VFX_Description: The ink cloud collapses inward to a point, dragging the target with it.

Name: Ink Jet
VFX_Description: A propulsive squirt of ink black enough to look solid.

Name: Swallowing Ink
VFX_Description: The ink cloud doesn't disperse — it contracts around the target's head.

Name: Blink Home
VFX_Description: The squid folds into its own ink and reappears a metre away, refreshed.

Name: Twilight Maw
VFX_Description: The jaws open against a darkening sky; the bite lands out of the glare.

Name: Basking Fury
VFX_Description: Heat-shimmer pours off the scales as the monitor lunges.

Name: Tail Sweep
VFX_Description: A low, heavy tail arc that kicks up a fan of sand.

Name: Duskshift
VFX_Description: Scales ripple through sunset colours until the lizard half-vanishes.

Name: Requiem Shriek
VFX_Description: The wail becomes visible — concentric rings that shred what they cross.

Name: Wailing Touch
VFX_Description: A pale hand passes through the target; the sound arrives late.

Name: Keening
VFX_Description: A held shriek; threads of the target visibly fray loose.

Name: Death Omen
VFX_Description: The banshee points; a black mark blooms where she looks.

Name: Buried Fang
VFX_Description: A strike from below the sand, fangs first, venom mixed with grit.

Name: Constrict
VFX_Description: Loops of muscle stack around the target with a dry rasp.

Name: Ambush Strike
VFX_Description: The sand bulges and the strike is already over.

Name: Sand Swim
VFX_Description: The sidewinder pours itself under the surface like water.

Name: Dream of Water
VFX_Description: A cool blue oasis blooms around the target, then evaporates into the hit.

Name: Double Image
VFX_Description: Two identical cats strike; only one leaves pawprints.

Name: Mirage Claw
VFX_Description: The claw comes from where the cat isn't.

Name: Heat Haze
VFX_Description: The cat's outline wavers and doubles in the shimmer.

Name: Sandblast
VFX_Description: A shotgun cone of ash and quartz at point-blank range.

Name: Grinding Gale
VFX_Description: A sustained blast of sand that polishes what it strikes.

Name: Reform
VFX_Description: The construct collapses to a dune and rebuilds itself grain by grain.

Name: Stormwall
VFX_Description: A standing wave of sand curls over the team like a cresting dune.

Name: Thousand Fangs
VFX_Description: The brood strikes as one — a wave of small mouths.

Name: Matriarch's Coil
VFX_Description: The great body wraps the target once, tightens, releases.

Name: Viper Spit
VFX_Description: A precise dart of venom that hisses where it lands.

Name: Brood Call
VFX_Description: Dozens of small vipers surface and coil around their mother.

Name: White-Hot Rend
VFX_Description: Both claws cross at full killing heat; the X-shaped afterglow lingers.

Name: Killing Heat
VFX_Description: Afterimages of heat hang in the air along the slash path.

Name: Sear Swipe
VFX_Description: The claw glows forge-orange; the wound smokes instead of bleeding.

Name: Kindle
VFX_Description: The claws brighten from ember-red toward white.

Name: Continental Roll
VFX_Description: The impossible: the whole mountain-shell tips, rolls, and rights itself.

Name: Weight of Ages
VFX_Description: One deliberate step forward. The ground remembers it.

Name: Ruin Shrug
VFX_Description: The tortoise shifts; a cornice of its shell-ruins drops on the target.

Name: Ancient Patience
VFX_Description: The colossus settles lower; moss visibly spreads over its plates.

Name: Simoom's Wrath
VFX_Description: The horizon turns brown and arrives all at once.

Name: Sand Cyclone
VFX_Description: A person-sized dust devil engulfs the target's head.

Name: Scouring Wind
VFX_Description: A ribbon of sand-laden wind snaps like a whip.

Name: Djinn Step
VFX_Description: The djinn disperses and re-forms three strides closer.

Name: End Is Beginning
VFX_Description: For one frame the serpent's ring closes around the entire arena.

Name: Eternal Bind
VFX_Description: Coils close in a pattern with no visible beginning.

Name: World Coil
VFX_Description: A section of endless body simply tightens across the field.

Name: Tail Swallow
VFX_Description: The serpent bites its own tail; what ailed it travels the loop and is gone.

Name: Dissolving Flood
VFX_Description: A wave of acid that eats colour out of everything it crosses.

Name: Acid Dribble
VFX_Description: A thin line of smoking fluid arcs from the larva's mouth.

Name: Corrosive Burst
VFX_Description: The grub convulses and vents acid from every pore at once.

Name: Curl Up
VFX_Description: The larva rolls into a glistening, rubbery ball.

Name: Husk Detonation
VFX_Description: The outer husk explodes outward in a ring of thorn shrapnel.

Name: Thorn Volley
VFX_Description: A rattling burst of woody spines from the carapace seams.

Name: Branch Jab
VFX_Description: What looked like a dead branch stabs forward.

Name: Mimic Bark
VFX_Description: The beetle stills completely; its outline stops reading as a creature.

Name: Bloomlung
VFX_Description: Spores in the target's wounds bloom all at once, tearing outward.

Name: Dart
VFX_Description: A needling dive too quick to swat.

Name: Spore Dusting
VFX_Description: A puff of grey-green motes settles and clings.

Name: Carrier Swarm
VFX_Description: The fly's swarm splits and orbits its fungal allies, feeding them.

Name: Silken Guillotine
VFX_Description: A single silk strand pulled taut at neck height, then a shove.

Name: Fang Strike
VFX_Description: The humanoid torso bends impossibly to bring fangs down.

Name: Paralytic Silk
VFX_Description: A cast net of silk that tightens as the target struggles.

Name: Web Larder
VFX_Description: The target is spun once, twice — hung like stock in a pantry.

Name: Rooted Feast
VFX_Description: Rootlets spear into the target and pulse as they draw.

Name: Snap Trap
VFX_Description: The head-bloom closes on the target with a wet clap.

Name: Digestive Bath
VFX_Description: Clear fluid sluices over the target; surfaces begin to soften.

Name: Overgrowth
VFX_Description: Vines burst from the soil and lattice over the team.

Name: Pandemic Bite
VFX_Description: The bite lingers a beat too long — something is left behind.

Name: Chitin Clip
VFX_Description: Mandibles nip once, almost politely.

Name: Release the Colony
VFX_Description: The shell lifts; a glittering tide pours out and onto the target.

Name: Host's Gift
VFX_Description: A few parasites leap to the ally and eat what troubles it.

Name: Answered Prayer
VFX_Description: Both scythe-arms descend in perfect symmetry, like a benediction.

Name: Prayer Strike
VFX_Description: Forelimbs unfold from the prayer pose already mid-strike.

Name: Between Blinks
VFX_Description: You blink. It is somewhere else. You did not see it move.

Name: Silent Grace
VFX_Description: The mantis bows; the air forgets to carry its sound.

Name: The Swarm Descends
VFX_Description: The sky grains over; the sound arrives before the darkness does.

Name: Swarm Surge
VFX_Description: The single drone blurs into a local cloud of itself.

Name: Strip Field
VFX_Description: Everything green in a metre radius vanishes mid-swing.

Name: Devour
VFX_Description: A mouthful of the target simply ceases to be there.

Name: Coronation Swarm
VFX_Description: The half-fungal brood rises behind their queen and falls as one.

Name: Sting
VFX_Description: A surgical sting; the puncture blooms dark immediately.

Name: Queen's Decree
VFX_Description: A pheromone shimmer rolls outward; allies' movements sharpen.

Name: Spore Brood
VFX_Description: Fungal larvae seed the wound and begin, audibly, to grow.

Name: The Deep Roots Rise
VFX_Description: The visible trunk is still. Everything else in the ground is not.

Name: Root Grasp
VFX_Description: A root the width of a road closes around the target.

Name: World-Root Aegis
VFX_Description: Roots rise and weave a living palisade around the team.

Name: Sap of Ages
VFX_Description: Golden sap beads from the bark and runs uphill to the wounded.

Name: Sheer Face Slam
VFX_Description: The crab rides a slab of falling cliff-face into the target.

Name: Drop Ambush
VFX_Description: It lets go of the cliff. Gravity does the aiming.

Name: Pincer Crush
VFX_Description: A claw the colour of the cliff closes with a hydraulic crunch.

Name: Stonecling
VFX_Description: The crab flattens against rock and becomes indistinguishable from it.

Name: Juggernaut Roll
VFX_Description: It circles the arena once, gathering speed, then stops using the target.

Name: Momentum Crash
VFX_Description: The spiked sphere arrives at full downhill speed.

Name: Roll Over
VFX_Description: A short, brutal roll straight across the target.

Name: Spikeball
VFX_Description: The pillbug locks into a sphere of interlocking spikes.

Name: Consume Bedrock
VFX_Description: The worm takes a bite out of the world and armors itself with it.

Name: Caustic Glide
VFX_Description: The slug slides across the target; the path smokes.

Name: Dissolve Stone
VFX_Description: A concentrated spit; solid surfaces run like candle wax.

Name: Molten Mucus
VFX_Description: A pool of glowing slime spreads beneath the target.

Name: Cragfire Dive

Name: Furnace Breath
VFX_Description: A cone of superheated air — no flame, just distortion and blistering.

Name: Talon Rake
VFX_Description: A gliding pass; four parallel lines open on the target.

Name: Updraft
VFX_Description: Wings catch a thermal; the drake hangs higher than it should.

Name: Tyrant's Verdict
VFX_Description: Both claws slam down in judgment; the ground cracks in a sunburst.

Name: Scornful Backhand
VFX_Description: A dismissive sweep of one ore-crusted claw.

Name: Decree of Stone
VFX_Description: The Despot points; grey creeps over the target's joints.

Name: Court of Rock
VFX_Description: Pillars of stone rise in a half-circle behind the team, like thrones.

Name: Exsanguinate

Name: Crimson Tithe

Name: Tap Vein
VFX_Description: A discreet puncture; a red thread runs back along the leech.

Name: Anticoagulant

Name: Tidal Wall of Claws

Name: Multitude Grip
VFX_Description: Small claws by the score close on every available edge of the target.

Name: Colony Slam
VFX_Description: A dozen fused claws strike as one fist.

Name: Fuse Ranks
VFX_Description: The colony grinds tighter; gaps between individuals vanish.

Name: Swallow Light
VFX_Description: The arena goes dark for one beat. The damage is already done.

Name: Absent Sting
VFX_Description: The tail strikes; where it lands there is briefly nothing at all.

Name: Nullpinch
VFX_Description: The claw is a claw-shaped absence; the cut has no edge.

Name: Lightless Carapace
VFX_Description: The shell drinks the arena's light; shadows bend toward it.

Name: Titan's Downstroke

Name: Iron Backfist
VFX_Description: An ore-plated limb swings with foundry weight.

Name: Ore-Bound Bulk

Name: Foundry Guard

Name: Eruption
VFX_Description: The crawler's back opens like a caldera; the arena rains fire.

Name: Magma Vent
VFX_Description: A carapace seam splits; liquid rock jets across the target.

Name: Obsidian Edge
VFX_Description: A limb of cooling glass opens a seam that glows at the edges.

Name: Cooling Shell
VFX_Description: The surface blackens and crazes; heat banks deeper inside.

Name: Sky Lacerate

Name: Scissor Dive
VFX_Description: Two crossing dive-passes leave an X of parted air.

Name: Wind Shear
VFX_Description: A wingbeat leaves a visible blade of compressed air.

Name: Tailwind
VFX_Description: A ribbon of wind curls around the team, lifting feathers and dust.

Name: Stormcrown
VFX_Description: Every spark on the field leaps to the crow's brow, then to the target.

Name: Ball Lightning
VFX_Description: A slow, wandering sphere of light that detonates on contact.

Name: Static Peck
VFX_Description: A peck that leaves a crawling blue spark behind.

Name: Thundercall
VFX_Description: The crow spreads its wings; distant thunder answers on cue.

Name: Overload Flash
VFX_Description: One blinding discharge; afterimages of the wing pattern hang in the air.

Name: Dust Zap
VFX_Description: Glittering wing-dust ignites in a crackling flash.

Name: EM Pulse

Name: Magnet Wings

Name: Mountain-Bearer

Name: Boulder Drop
VFX_Description: A shadow grows; the boulder arrives from higher than seems fair.

Name: Hunting Stoop
VFX_Description: A folded-wing dive that flattens grass in a widening ring.

Name: Talon Snatch
VFX_Description: Talons the size of gates close and release.

Name: Twisterfang
VFX_Description: The chimera rides its own tornado down onto the target.

Name: Keening Bite
VFX_Description: The wolf-jaws close; the howl continues through the bite.

Name: Tornado Howl
VFX_Description: The howl becomes a visible funnel that walks toward the target.

Name: Eye of the Funnel
VFX_Description: A ring of calm air settles around the ally; debris orbits it.

Name: Megavolt Delivery
VFX_Description: The mantle glows white and grounds its entire charge through the target.

Name: Discharge Sweep
VFX_Description: A low pass trailing a curtain of arcing current.

Name: Volt Graze
VFX_Description: A gliding pass; a single arc snaps from wingtip to target.

Name: Thermal Ride
VFX_Description: The ray banks into an unseen column of rising air.

Name: Sky Serpent's Verdict
VFX_Description: The clouds part in a spiral; the couatl descends the middle of it.

Name: Feathered Lightning
VFX_Description: Two strikes from two directions, trailing rainbow after-glare.

Name: Plume Strike
VFX_Description: A feathered coil lashes out of a cloudbank.

Name: Cloudcoil
VFX_Description: The serpent winds itself in cloud until only colours show through.

Name: Hundred-Headed Storm
VFX_Description: Funnel clouds descend like striking heads, one after another.

Name: Storm Maw
VFX_Description: The dragon's mouth opens on rotating winds.

Name: Pressure Front

Name: Cyclone Shield
VFX_Description: The tempest tightens around the dragon into a visible wall.

Name: The Wind That Was First

Name: Stormfeather Volley
VFX_Description: Feathers leave the impossible wings like thrown knives.

Name: First Wind
VFX_Description: The strike lands before the wingbeat is heard.

Name: Unbroken Gale
VFX_Description: The gale that has never stopped bends to pass through the team.

Name: I Am the Storm
VFX_Description: The dragon dissolves into the stormfront; the stormfront attacks.

Name: Lightning Spear
VFX_Description: A single bolt held in the claw like a javelin, then thrown.

Name: Thunder Rake
VFX_Description: Claws of the storm-merged dragon trail forked light.

Name: Stormcall
VFX_Description: The permanent storm above deepens and leans toward the field.

Name: Launch Ball
VFX_Description: The inflated ball fires itself like a released cork.

Name: Gutwater Burst
VFX_Description: The toad vents swallowed bogwater in a rancid pressure-jet.

Name: Bounce Slam
VFX_Description: The toad arcs up and lands seat-first on the target.

Name: Inflate
VFX_Description: The toad swells into a taut, quivering sphere.

Name: Fever Dream
VFX_Description: The bog warps kaleidoscopically around the target as the hit lands.

Name: Slick Strike
VFX_Description: A whip of the glistening tail, gone before the spray lands.

Name: Hallucinogen Coat
VFX_Description: The target's pupils bloom; it flinches at things that are not there.

Name: Skinshed
VFX_Description: The newt slides out of its own skin, leaving troubles in the husk.

Name: Blightswarm
VFX_Description: The fly multiplies into a droning column that passes through the target.

Name: Reanimating Sting
VFX_Description: The sting glows faint green; nearby dead things twitch.

Name: Corpse Nip
VFX_Description: A quick bite that smells worse than it looks.

Name: Plague Eggs
VFX_Description: A clutch of pale eggs deposited in one pass; they do not stay eggs.

Name: Stitchflesh

Name: Bonetongue
VFX_Description: A tongue of vertebrae lashes out and retracts.

Name: Bog Benediction
VFX_Description: Marsh-light gathers in the frog's ribcage and pours over the ally.

Name: Deathcroak
VFX_Description: A croak from a throat that no longer needs air; frost rims the water.

Name: Glowfeast
VFX_Description: The maw opens beneath the light the target was watching.

Name: Lure Flick
VFX_Description: The glowing lure snaps forward like a fishing cast.

Name: Mesmer Light
VFX_Description: The lure pulses in a rhythm the target's eyes cannot leave.

Name: Lantern of the Lost

Name: Fenbreaker
VFX_Description: The salamander erupts from below, dragging half the fen with it.

Name: Marsh Maul
VFX_Description: A mud-slick forearm swats with hippo weight.

Name: Parasite Shrug
VFX_Description: The flank-parasites migrate off Grendel and onto someone else.

Name: Bog Lurk
VFX_Description: Grendel sinks to eye-level in the mire and goes still.

Name: Take You Under
VFX_Description: Hands — many more than two — reach up from the waterline.

Name: Cold Grip
VFX_Description: A waterlogged hand closes; the cold spreads from its print.

Name: Half-Here
VFX_Description: The draugr thins to a suggestion; the bog shows through it.

Name: Drowned Memory
VFX_Description: The target's limbs move as if underwater; bubbles rise from dry ground.

Name: Marionette Harvest
VFX_Description: Every strung corpse on the vine-network pulls one string at once.

Name: Strangling Growth
VFX_Description: Green shoots visibly lengthen as they wind up the target's legs.

Name: Tendril Snap
VFX_Description: A vine cracks like a whip, trailing grave-soil.

Name: Puppet Corpse
VFX_Description: A vine-strung carcass rises and mimes the allies' stances.

Name: What Lies Beneath

Name: Brood Slap
VFX_Description: A webbed hand the size of a door pats the target flat.

Name: Mother's Milk

Name: Spawn Tide
VFX_Description: Ten thousand tadpole-things surface at once and push the team forward.

Name: Nameless End

Name: Absent Touch
VFX_Description: The mist-figure's hand passes through armor as if it were rumor.

Name: Unwritten
VFX_Description: The figure gestures; the target's advantages simply stop having happened.

Name: Mourning Veil
VFX_Description: Grey mist thickens around the team into a standing shroud.

Name: Sporefall
VFX_Description: The cave ceiling releases a slow snowfall of glowing spores.

Name: Cap Thump
VFX_Description: The mushroom headbutts, cap-first, with a dull drumbeat.

Name: Vertigo Spores
VFX_Description: Motes drift up under the target's face; its footing goes wrong.

Name: Mycowall
VFX_Description: Shelf-fungus plates fan out of the cap in overlapping rows.

Name: Memory Flood
VFX_Description: The ink cloud collapses inward; the target visibly loses the thread.

Name: Tentacle Slap
VFX_Description: A casual, heavy slap that leaves an ink handprint.

Name: Lethean Ink
VFX_Description: Black ink that spreads upstream, against the current, toward the eyes.

Name: Jet Retreat
VFX_Description: One pulse of the mantle and the octopus is elsewhere, calmer.

Name: Total Colonization
VFX_Description: The mold blooms from the target's own joints, moving them wrongly.

Name: Spore Lash
VFX_Description: A fruiting tendril flicks a line of dust across the target.

Name: Neural Threading
VFX_Description: Fine white filaments crawl visibly under the target's skin.

Name: Symbiotic Bloom
VFX_Description: A soft bracket of fungus flowers on the ally's shoulder, feeding it.

Name: Inevitable Future
VFX_Description: The strike arrives exactly where the target was always going to be.

Name: Shell Chime
VFX_Description: The nautilus shell rings one clear, wrong-feeling note.

Name: Glimpse the End
VFX_Description: The target sees, for an instant, exactly how this goes for it.

Name: Prophecy Ward
VFX_Description: A spiral of faint futures winds around the ally, deflecting the worst one.

Name: Unfolding Horror
VFX_Description: The body opens like a puzzle-box of limbs, then closes on the target.

Name: Skitterflank
VFX_Description: The strike comes from a direction that shouldn't have existed.

Name: Jointed Lunge
VFX_Description: Too many elbows unfold at once; the reach is wrong.

Name: Wrong Angles
VFX_Description: The crustacean walks a path the eye refuses to follow.

Name: Vanishing Strike
VFX_Description: The trace-light goes out. The impact is the only proof of location.

Name: Traceflash
VFX_Description: A dotted line of light appears; the hit follows it.

Name: Afterimage Trail
VFX_Description: The glowing trail loops and doubles back; the body is not where it is.

Name: Hypnotic Wake
VFX_Description: The light-trail draws a slow spiral; the target's eyes follow it down.

Name: Breach of the Deep
VFX_Description: The fungal leviathan breaches in slow motion and falls forever.

Name: Bulk Drift
VFX_Description: The whale-mass simply continues through the target's position.

Name: Spore Ballast
VFX_Description: The body densifies, spore-layers packing like sediment.

Name: Filter Cleanse
VFX_Description: The whale inhales the water around the ally; troubles go with it.

Name: Where It Goes
VFX_Description: For one frame the target is half through the lure-hole. Then the frame ends.

Name: Spacetooth
VFX_Description: The bite closes through the target, armor and all, via somewhere else.

Name: Riftlure Snap
VFX_Description: The lure-hole dilates; the jaws arrive from inside it.

Name: Bait the Hole
VFX_Description: The hole in space drifts closer to the target, patiently.

Name: Hyphal Sting
VFX_Description: A single thread rises from the floor and pricks like a needle.

Name: The Network Provides
VFX_Description: Threads surface beneath the ally, delivering what was needed.

Name: Rot and Renew
VFX_Description: The target starts breaking down; an ally visibly draws on the yield.

Name: We Are Elsewhere
VFX_Description: The fruiting body slumps, hollow — the network was never only here.

Name: Wake the Deep
VFX_Description: The 'cave formation' opens its eye. The water level changes.

Name: Cavern Collapse
VFX_Description: The kraken pulls the ceiling down; the cave becomes a fist.

Name: Eightfold Grip
VFX_Description: Arms find every limb and joint at once and constrict.

Name: Colossal Sweep
VFX_Description: An arm the size of a bridge span clears the space.

Name: Crystallize Grief
VFX_Description: Sorrow condenses on the target as spreading, weighty glass.

Name: Refraction Lance
VFX_Description: Light bends through the wraith and exits as a solid beam.

Name: Shardflick
VFX_Description: An orbiting shard snaps out on an invisible thread.

Name: Prism Orbit
VFX_Description: The drifting crystals accelerate into a glittering defensive ring.

Name: Final Draught
VFX_Description: The bat drinks until the target's outline goes monochrome.

Name: Life Sip
VFX_Description: A visible grey stream flows from target to bat.

Name: Grey Nip
VFX_Description: A featherweight bite; colour drains from the point of contact.

Name: Grey Wake
VFX_Description: The bat's wake settles on the target like fine ash that will not brush off.

Name: Heartstone Beam
VFX_Description: The creature aims its own chest; the gem discharges through it.

Name: Facet Jab
VFX_Description: A crystalline knuckle catches the light on the way in.

Name: Core Shine
VFX_Description: The heart-gem flares through the body's translucence.

Name: Hardlight Wall
VFX_Description: A pane of projected gemlight snaps into place before the ally.

Name: Masterpiece
VFX_Description: The earlier incision was the sketch. This is the finished work.

Name: Surgical Strike
VFX_Description: The blow enters at the one seam the armor cannot cover.

Name: Incision
VFX_Description: One clean line, placed exactly where intended.

Name: Arterial Map
VFX_Description: Faint red lines glow through the target's skin — a diagram only it can read.

Name: Reassembled Wrong
VFX_Description: The specter rebuilds itself around the target, briefly, incorrectly.

Name: Piecewise Assault
VFX_Description: Each fragment attacks separately, from four directions.

Name: Fragment Swipe
VFX_Description: A disconnected hand crosses the space between its pieces.

Name: Come Apart
VFX_Description: The specter disassembles; strikes pass through the gaps.

Name: The Hunt Concludes
VFX_Description: Every shadow in the room points the same way as the hound leaps.

Name: Devour Vitality
VFX_Description: The bite takes something less visible than flesh.

Name: Predestined Bite
VFX_Description: The jaws close where the target arrives, not where it was.

Name: Scent of Endings
VFX_Description: The hound inhales once; something in the target's shadow flinches.

Name: Perfect Reflection
VFX_Description: For one frame the two silhouettes are identical. Then one falls.

Name: Mirror Jab
VFX_Description: Your own arm, thrown back at you a half-beat late.

Name: Copied Stance
VFX_Description: The reflection adjusts its posture; suddenly the advantage is on its side.

Name: Familiar Face
VFX_Description: It turns around. The face is the target's own, slightly wrong.

Name: Red Formality
VFX_Description: A single courteous bow, a single motion, and the matter is settled.

Name: Noble Feast
VFX_Description: The noble feeds with terrible etiquette; not a drop is wasted.

Name: Contempt
VFX_Description: A gloved backhand delivered without looking.

Name: Command Presence
VFX_Description: The ancient meets the target's eyes; the target looks away first.

Name: Gemfire Bolt
VFX_Description: A lance of violet flame drawn straight from the buried soul-vessel.

Name: Soulspark
VFX_Description: A mote of pale fire leaps from the gem-vein to the target.

Name: Leaden Curse
VFX_Description: The target's shadow doubles in darkness and drags at its heels.

Name: Soul Elsewhere
VFX_Description: The body cracks apart — and re-knits, anchored to a light inside the wall.

Name: Step Through
VFX_Description: A hand — then more than a hand — exits the surface at the target.

Name: Backwards Cut
VFX_Description: The wound appears before the surface finishes moving.

Name: What It Reflects
VFX_Description: The blank surface ripples; something the target owned now shows on it.

Name: Nothing Looks Back
VFX_Description: Attackers see themselves missing from the mirror — and hesitate.

Name: Calving Burst
VFX_Description: The shard splits violently in two; both halves are already regrowing.

Name: Shard Storm
VFX_Description: The fragment spins; a halo of glass splinters saws outward.

Name: Glass Chip
VFX_Description: A flake of itself, flicked hard enough to bury.

Name: Self-Replicate
VFX_Description: New shards crystallize from the heat-haze and slot into place.

Name: Bonefire March
VFX_Description: It walks through its own cloud, igniting it as it comes.

Name: Ash Cuff
VFX_Description: A grey fist that leaves a powder print.

Name: Residual Purpose
VFX_Description: The golem straightens; whatever it was for, it remembers enough.

Name: Choking Cloud
VFX_Description: The walker exhales a slow, hot grey plume that hangs at head height.

Name: Sacrificial Maw
VFX_Description: The belly-grate opens. The fire inside is very old and very hungry.

Name: Idol Fist
VFX_Description: A hand of furnace-hot iron falls like a verdict.

Name: Furnace Belly
VFX_Description: The belly-grate glows white; touching the idol has a price.

Name: Iron Adoration
VFX_Description: The idol settles into worship-stillness; its plates seal seamlessly.

Name: Wyrmflare
VFX_Description: The wyrm rears and exhales its own body-heat in one white cone.

Name: Fire Coil
VFX_Description: Burning loops stack around the target and tighten.

Name: Flame Lash
VFX_Description: A whip of living fire licks across the target.

Name: Scorch Trail
VFX_Description: The serpent accelerates, its wake a line of standing flame.

Name: Three Heads One Hunger
VFX_Description: For once the heads agree. All three bite the same place.

Name: Trisected Flame
VFX_Description: Three breath-cones of different colours converge on one point.

Name: Threefold Snap
VFX_Description: Three heads strike in sequence — left, right, center.

Name: Discordant Roar
VFX_Description: Three voices roar three different notes; the dissonance hits like heat.

Name: Blastfurnace Roar
VFX_Description: The chest-furnace doors swing open mid-roar; the blast is industrial.

Name: Molten Rivets
VFX_Description: White-hot rivets fire from the shoulder-plates like grapeshot.

Name: Pig-Iron Bite
VFX_Description: Jaws of cast iron close with a foundry clang.

Name: Foundry Hide
VFX_Description: The plates seat themselves tighter; rivets glow along the seams.

Name: Uncontained
VFX_Description: The dragon stops holding itself together. Briefly. Deliberately.

Name: Containment Failure
VFX_Description: A scale lifts; a jet of the inner storm escapes at the target.

Name: Cinder Slash
VFX_Description: A claw of banked embers drags four glowing lines.

Name: Stoke
VFX_Description: The internal firestorm brightens through the scale-seams.

Name: Contingency Zero
VFX_Description: Something long-dormant authorizes force. The response is total.

Name: Warden Strike
VFX_Description: A measured blow, exactly as hard as required and no harder.

Name: Standing Order
VFX_Description: The construct resets to its waiting posture; readiness accumulates.

Name: Protocol Shield
VFX_Description: A barrier of pale instruction-light projects in front of the ally.

Name: Before There Was Light
VFX_Description: Everything dims except the burning. The burning was here first.

Name: Primordial Spark
VFX_Description: A single spark older than colour; it lands like a hammer.

Name: First Flame
VFX_Description: A small, patient flame that ignores water, wind, and argument.

Name: Anoint in Fire
VFX_Description: Fire passes over the ally without burning — a coronation, not an attack.

Name: Deprecation
VFX_Description: The target's outline is redrawn without its best features, then struck.

Name: Editing Stroke
VFX_Description: A single line is drawn through the target, as through a word.

Name: Rewrite Terms
VFX_Description: The designer annotates; the errors change ownership.

Name: Design Flaw
VFX_Description: Blueprint-lines flicker over the target, highlighting one joint in red.
